name: Squat
description: Barbell squat to build leg and hip strength.
steps: Lower hips until thighs are parallel to the floor.
Drive through heels to stand back up.

name: French Press
description: Overhead triceps extension to isolate the triceps.
steps: Hold barbell overhead with both hands.
Lower weight behind your head by bending elbows.
Extend arms to raise weight back up.

name: Incline Curl
description: Dumbbell curl performed on an incline bench.
steps: Sit on an incline bench holding dumbbells.
Curl the weights upward while keeping elbows still.
Lower slowly to the starting position.

name: French Press (Variation)
description: Another set of triceps-focused French press.
steps: Lower behind head with controlled motion.
Extend elbows to return to starting position.

name: Concentration Curl
description: Isolation curl focusing on the biceps peak.
steps: Sit and brace elbow against inner thigh.

name: Push Up
description: Bodyweight pushing movement targeting chest and triceps.
steps: Place hands on the floor slightly wider than shoulders.
Push back up to full arm extension.

name: Two Hand Curl
description: Barbell curl using both hands simultaneously.

name: Dumbbell Circle
description: Shoulder mobility and endurance movement using circular arm motion.
steps: Hold light dumbbells at your sides.
Raise arms and perform circular motions.

name: Reverse Curl
description: Curl with palms facing downward to target forearms.
steps: Grip barbell with palms facing down.

name: Wrist Curl
steps: Sit holding barbell with wrists resting on knees.

name: Wrist Curl (Variation)
description: Additional wrist curl variation for forearms.

name: Sit Up
steps: Lie on your back with knees bent.

name: Calf Raise
description: Standing movement to strengthen calf muscles.
steps: Stand upright with feet hip-width apart.
